what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment ledger entry that records an image attachment (att-07d2368c) for the design-source channel, pointing to image://design-source/company-info/p-17 and recording when it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset
No body content or descriptive text follows the frontmatter
standouts: The target is an image:// URI rather than a filesystem path
The record is extremely sparse: only type and pointer, no caption or context
conventions: Markdown file with YAML frontmatter delimited by '---'
Channel-memory schema separating attachment metadata from substrate content
concerns: No caption, alt text, or description for the image
No information about the storage location or resolvability of the image:// URI
No version or checksum for the referenced asset
notes: A bare attachment pointer that links the design-source channel memory to an image asset named p-17, recorded at 2026-06-22T11:30:59Z.
questions: What does 'p-17' represent and where is the actual image stored?
Which channel-memory entry or message does this attachment belong to?
Is the image:// URI resolvable by the consuming system?
Are there caption, licensing, or version details stored elsewhere?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is an image attachment record for the design-source channel, and the file does exactly that by storing a typed pointer and timestamp; it is more minimal than a full asset descriptor but not inconsistent.
intention_signals: It appears intended to register an image asset as part of the design-source channel's memory so the image can be retrieved or cited alongside related design substrate.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped, typed attachment record that associates the design-source channel with an image asset identifier, supporting asset provenance and retrieval without embedding the asset itself.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file for the design-source channel that records an image attachment pointing to image://design-source/company-info/p-17 with an ISO 8601 addition timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To register an image asset reference within the design-source channel memory for later retrieval or contextual association.
